insight.insightText: Your wake-ups are remarkably consistent — 12 of 14 verified on the first try, almost always within a three-minute window. The clear outliers are both Mondays: April 13 needed a retry, and April 20 required two and still ended in a coerced reject. Something about the Sunday-to-Monday transition is making verification harder, even though your Sunday wake-ups themselves look clean.
insight.suggestedAction: Try shifting Sunday night bedtime 20–30 minutes earlier and check your Monday morning lighting setup.
